_comment: Drop this fragment into your project's .claude/settings.json (merging with any existing hooks). Adjust the file_path matcher to point at where synapse-design-md is installed in your tree.

_notes: Reads .synapse-design-md.json to map edited paths to contracts.
Verifies the touched contract(s) against the most recent probe in evidence/contracts/<name>/.
Forwards verifier output to stderr so the editor surfaces violations inline.
Exits 2 only on descriptive contract failure — aspirational warnings exit 0 and do not block.
